response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song "Mandi Biar Wangi ☆ Washa Washa!" from on-screen text in the top-left corner. Performed a web search for 'Kobo Kanaeru "Washa Washa!" lyrics Indonesian and English' to retrieve the full lyrics and their English translation. Analyzed the visual timeline to mark the end of the song performance at 04:26.000 and the subsequent dialogue segment.
response.global_summary: The video features an animated performance by Kobo Kanaeru of her original song "Mandi Biar Wangi ☆ Washa Washa!", followed by a brief dialogue segment with Mori Calliope. The song is performed in Indonesian.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru performs "Mandi Biar Wangi ☆ Washa Washa!" in a bathroom-themed virtual set. The song title and artist appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Washa-washa-wah, 'ku cuci rambutku
Washa-washa-wah, 'ku gosok badanku
Shiki-shiki-shi, 'ku sikat gigi
Sekarang sudah wangi

Shoko-shoko-shok, keringkan rambutku
Shoko-shoko-shok, keringkan badanku
Pakai seragam yang lengkap bersiap 'tuk sekolah
Sampai jumpa mami papi

Habis main, keringat bercucuran
Rambut lepek, juga berminyak
Tapi aku lelah, aku ingin tidur saja
Memangnya yang nggak bisa, bentar lagi kah?

Bau badan tak tertahankan
Mami, papi aku kewalahan
Katanya mereka, ku harus pergi mandi dulu

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Washa-washa-wah, I wash my hair
Washa-washa-wah, I scrub my body
Shiki-shiki-shi, I brush my teeth
Now I'm fragrant

Shoko-shoko-shok, I dry my hair
Shoko-shoko-shok, I dry my body
Wear a complete uniform, getting ready for school
Goodbye Mommy, Daddy

After playing, sweat is pouring down
Hair becomes limp, also oily
But I'm tired, I just want to sleep
Washing your face isn't enough, right?

Body odor is unbearable
Mommy, Daddy are overwhelmed
They said "I have to go, go, go, go to take a bath now"

Washa-washa-wah, I wash my hair
Washa-washa-wah, I scrub my body
Shiki-shiki-shi, I brush my teeth
Now I'm fragrant

A beautiful dream becomes reality
For a child who obeys the rules
Twinkling stars in the sky
All things can I do if I have taken a bath
(I have taken a bath, I have taken a bath, I have taken a bath, yay)
